ml_tasks = ["Leaf Classification", "Spaceship Titanic", "Random Acts of Pizza", "Detecting Insults"]
# 将 0~1 之间的值统一乘以 100，变成百分制
for task, models in ml_score_data.items():
    for model_name, scores in models.items():
        ml_score_data[task][model_name] = [
            (s * 100.0) if (0.0 <= s <= 1.0) else s
            for s in scores
        ]

# 2.2 Jericho 四个游戏（横轴 steps = 30 / 50 / 100 / 200）
budgets_jericho = [30, 50, 100, 200]
jericho_score_data = {
    "Zork1": {
        "DeepSeek-V3.2-Chat": [12.1875, 24.25, 33.6875, 29.375],

        "Gemini 2.5 pro": [9.375, 31.875, 31.875, 63.125],
        "Qwen3-8B": [6.875, 3.75, 3.75, 6.25],
        "Qwen3-14B": [6.25, 5.0, 14.375, 12.1875],
        "Qwen3-32B": [4.375, 11.25, 16.5625, 14.6875],
        "Timer-LM": [16.875, 21.25, 34.375, 45.625],
    },

        "DeepSeek-V3.2-Chat": [48.75, 55.416666666666664, 66.66666666666667, 82.08333333333333],
        "GPT-5.1(medium)": [77.5, 107.5, 117.5, 117.5],

        "Qwen3-8B": [47.5, 50.625, 64.375, 53.75],
        "Qwen3-14B": [45.0, 56.25, 39.375, 61.25],
        "Qwen3-32B": [50.0, 69.375, 83.125, 77.5],
        "Timer-LM": [51.875, 77.5, 102.5, 120.625],
    },
}
jericho_games = ["Zork1", "Advent", "Enchanter", "Detective"]

# --- 3. 视觉配置（颜色 / 线型 / marker） ---
# 使用 Okabe-Ito（色盲友好）为主，并让 Timer-LM 用更醒目的 vermillion 强调
PAPER_COLORS = {
    # Ours (highlight)
    "Timer-LM": "#D55E00",      # vermillion（主强调）
    # "1226_RL_200": "#CC79A7",   # 若未来再加入其他 RL 变体
    # Others (harmonious & distinguishable)
    "DeepSeek-V3.2-Chat": "#0072B2",  # blue
    "GPT-5.1(medium)":    "#009E73",  # bluish green
    "Gemini 2.5 pro":     "#E69F00",  # orange
    "Qwen3-8B":           "#56B4E9",  # sky blue
    "Qwen3-14B":          "#CC6677",  # muted rose
    "14B-V2":             "#999999",  # gray
    "Qwen3-32B":          "#333333",  # dark gray
}
LINESTYLES = {
    "Timer-LM": "--",
    "DeepSeek-V3.2-Chat": "-",
    "GPT-5.1(medium)": "-",
    "Gemini 2.5 pro": "-",
    "Qwen3-8B": "-",
    "Qwen3-14B": "-",
    "14B-V2": "-.",
    "Qwen3-32B": "-",
}
MARKERS = {
    "Timer-LM": "D",
    "DeepSeek-V3.2-Chat": "o",
    "GPT-5.1(medium)": "s",
    "Gemini 2.5 pro": "^",
    "Qwen3-8B": "v",
    "Qwen3-14B": "P",
    "14B-V2": "*",
    "Qwen3-32B": "h",
}

import matplotlib.gridspec as gridspec
# --- 4. 绘图：用 GridSpec 预留 legend 行，彻底解决挤压问题 ---
fig = plt.figure(figsize=(22, 9.2))
gs = gridspec.GridSpec(
    nrows=3, ncols=4,
    height_ratios=[1.0, 1.0, 0.16],   # 第 3 行专门给 legend / (b)
    hspace=0.38, wspace=0.25
)
axes = np.empty((2, 4), dtype=object)
for r in range(2):
    for c in range(4):
        axes[r, c] = fig.add_subplot(gs[r, c])
# legend 专用轴（不画任何东西）
ax_leg = fig.add_subplot(gs[2, :])
ax_leg.axis("off")
legend_handles = []
legend_labels = []
seen_models = set()
XLABEL = "Time Budget (x)"
# ---------- 上排：ML tasks ----------
for col, task in enumerate(ml_tasks):
    ax = axes[0, col]
    models = ml_score_data.get(task, {})
    ax.grid(axis="y", linestyle="--", linewidth=0.6, alpha=0.3, zorder=0)
    for model_name, scores in models.items():
        color = PAPER_COLORS.get(model_name, "gray")
        linestyle = LINESTYLES.get(model_name, "-")
        marker = MARKERS.get(model_name, "o")
        is_ours = ("Timer" in model_name) or ("RL" in model_name)
        x_vals = budgets_ml[:len(scores)]
        y_vals = scores
        line, = ax.plot(
            x_vals, y_vals,
            label=model_name,
            color=color, linestyle=linestyle, marker=marker,
            markersize=9.5 if is_ours else 8.5,
            linewidth=3.2 if is_ours else 2.5,
            alpha=1.0 if is_ours else 0.85,
            zorder=11 if is_ours else 6,
            markeredgecolor="white",
            markeredgewidth=1.2 if is_ours else 0.9,
        )
        if model_name not in seen_models:
            legend_handles.append(line)
            legend_labels.append(model_name)
            seen_models.add(model_name)
    ax.set_title(task, fontsize=18, fontweight="bold", pad=10)
    ax.set_xticks(budgets_ml)
    ax.set_xlim(0.9, 5.1)
    ax.yaxis.set_major_formatter(ticker.StrMethodFormatter("{x:.1f}"))
    # 上排不显示 x 轴标题
    ax.set_xlabel("")
    ax.tick_params(axis="x", labelbottom=True)
axes[0, 0].set_ylabel("Score (%)", fontsize=18, fontweight="bold", labelpad=8)

# ---------- 下排：Jericho games ----------
for col, game in enumerate(jericho_games):
    ax = axes[1, col]
    models = jericho_score_data.get(game, {})
    ax.grid(axis="y", linestyle="--", linewidth=0.6, alpha=0.3, zorder=0)
    for model_name, scores in models.items():
        color = PAPER_COLORS.get(model_name, "gray")
        linestyle = LINESTYLES.get(model_name, "-")
        marker = MARKERS.get(model_name, "o")
        is_ours = ("Timer" in model_name) or ("RL" in model_name)
        x_vals = budgets_jericho[:len(scores)]
        y_vals = scores
        line, = ax.plot(
            x_vals, y_vals,
            label=model_name,
            color=color, linestyle=linestyle, marker=marker,
            markersize=9.5 if is_ours else 8.5,
            linewidth=3.2 if is_ours else 2.5,
            alpha=1.0 if is_ours else 0.85,
            zorder=11 if is_ours else 6,
            markeredgecolor="white",
            markeredgewidth=1.2 if is_ours else 0.9,
        )
        if model_name not in seen_models:
            legend_handles.append(line)
            legend_labels.append(model_name)
            seen_models.add(model_name)
    ax.set_title(game, fontsize=18, fontweight="bold", pad=10)
    ax.set_xticks(budgets_jericho)
    ax.set_xlim(25, 205)
    ax.yaxis.set_major_formatter(ticker.StrMethodFormatter("{x:.1f}"))
    # 下排统一 x label
    ax.set_xlabel(XLABEL, fontsize=18, fontweight="bold", labelpad=8)
axes[1, 0].set_ylabel("Score", fontsize=18, fontweight="bold", labelpad=8)

# --- (a)/(b) 标注：自动放到“行间空隙”和“legend 行上方”，避免压到图 ---
top_row_bottom = min(ax.get_position().y0 for ax in axes[0, :])
bottom_row_top = max(ax.get_position().y1 for ax in axes[1, :])
y_mid = 0.5 * (top_row_bottom + bottom_row_top)
# (a) 放在两行之间居中
fig.text(0.5, y_mid, "(a) Machine Learning Tasks",
         ha="center", va="center", fontsize=16)
# (b) 放在 legend 行的上方一点
leg_pos = ax_leg.get_position()
fig.text(0.5, leg_pos.y1 + 0.01, "(b) Interactive Games",
         ha="center", va="bottom", fontsize=16)

# --- 全局图例：放到专用 legend 轴里，绝不挤压子图 ---
ax_leg.legend(
    legend_handles, legend_labels,
    loc="center",
    ncol=4,
    frameon=False,
    handlelength=3.0,
    handletextpad=0.6,
    columnspacing=2.5,
    prop={"size": 16},
)
# 外边距（整体更像 paper）
fig.subplots_adjust(left=0.055, right=0.995, top=0.93, bottom=0.06)
# --- 保存：建议不要 bbox_inches="tight"，否则又可能裁剪/挤压文字 ---
output_png = "/mnt/shared-storage-user/llmbr-share/mayichuan/2025_Q4/Timely_Reasoner/Paper_Writing/combined_scaling_curve.png"
output_pdf = "/mnt/shared-storage-user/llmbr-share/mayichuan/2025_Q4/Timely_Reasoner/Paper_Writing/combined_scaling_curve.pdf"
plt.savefig(output_png, dpi=600)
plt.savefig(output_pdf, format="pdf", dpi=600)
print("Combined ML + Jericho scaling plot saved to:")
print(output_png)
print(output_pdf)
plt.show()
```
现在图是这样的。横轴标题有一点压到下面的图了。帮我改一下。

Looking at your image, I can see the x-axis labels are overlapping with the plots. Here's the fixed code with adjusted spacing:

mpl.rcParams.update({
    "font.family": "serif",

    "DeepSeek-V3.2-Chat": "-",

    "Gemini 2.5 pro": "-",

    "Timer-LM": "D",
    "DeepSeek-V3.2-Chat": "o",
    "GPT-5.1(medium)": "s",
    "Gemini 2.5 pro": "^",
    "Qwen3-8B": "v",

# --- 4. 绘图：用 GridSpec 预留 legend 行 ---
fig = plt.figure(figsize=(22, 9.2))
gs = gridspec.GridSpec(
    nrows=3, ncols=4,
    height_ratios=[1.0, 1.0, 0.16],
    hspace=0.48,  # 增加行间距，避免 xlabel 压到图上
    wspace=0.25
)
axes = np.empty((2, 4), dtype=object)
for r in range(2):
    for c in range(4):
        axes[r, c] = fig.add_subplot(gs[r, c])

ax_leg = fig.add_subplot(gs[2, :])
ax_leg.axis("off")

legend_handles = []
legend_labels = []
seen_models = set()

XLABEL = "Time Budget (x)"

# ---------- 上排：ML tasks ----------
for col, task in enumerate(ml_tasks):
    ax = axes[0, col]
    models = ml_score_data.get(task, {})
    ax.grid(axis="y", linestyle="--", linewidth=0.6, alpha=0.3, zorder=0)
    for model_name, scores in models.items():
        color = PAPER_COLORS.get(model_name, "gray")
        linestyle = LINESTYLES.get(model_name, "-")
        marker = MARKERS.get(model_name, "o")
        is_ours = ("Timer" in model_name) or ("RL" in model_name)
        x_vals = budgets_ml[:len(scores)]
        y_vals = scores
        line, = ax.plot(
            x_vals, y_vals,
            label=model_name,
            color=color, linestyle=linestyle, marker=marker,
            markersize=9.5 if is_ours else 8.5,
            linewidth=3.2 if is_ours else 2.5,
            alpha=1.0 if is_ours else 0.85,
            zorder=11 if is_ours else 6,
            markeredgecolor="white",
            markeredgewidth=1.2 if is_ours else 0.9,
        )
        if model_name not in seen_models:
            legend_handles.append(line)
            legend_labels.append(model_name)
            seen_models.add(model_name)
    ax.set_title(task, fontsize=18, fontweight="bold", pad=10)
    ax.set_xticks(budgets_ml)
    ax.set_xlim(0.9, 5.1)
    ax.yaxis.set_major_formatter(ticker.StrMethodFormatter("{x:.1f}"))
    ax.set_xlabel("")
    ax.tick_params(axis="x", labelbottom=True)
axes[0, 0].set_ylabel("Score (%)", fontsize=18, fontweight="bold", labelpad=8)

# ---------- 下排：Jericho games ----------
for col, game in enumerate(jericho_games):
    ax = axes[1, col]
    models = jericho_score_data.get(game, {})
    ax.grid(axis="y", linestyle="--", linewidth=0.6, alpha=0.3, zorder=0)
    for model_name, scores in models.items():
        color = PAPER_COLORS.get(model_name, "gray")
        linestyle = LINESTYLES.get(model_name, "-")
        marker = MARKERS.get(model_name, "o")
        is_ours = ("Timer" in model_name) or ("RL" in model_name)
        x_vals = budgets_jericho[:len(scores)]
        y_vals = scores
        line, = ax.plot(
            x_vals, y_vals,
            label=model_name,
            color=color, linestyle=linestyle, marker=marker,
            markersize=9.5 if is_ours else 8.5,
            linewidth=3.2 if is_ours else 2.5,
            alpha=1.0 if is_ours else 0.85,
            zorder=11 if is_ours else 6,
            markeredgecolor="white",
            markeredgewidth=1.2 if is_ours else 0.9,
        )
        if model_name not in seen_models:
            legend_handles.append(line)
            legend_labels.append(model_name)
            seen_models.add(model_name)
    ax.set_title(game, fontsize=18, fontweight="bold", pad=10)
    ax.set_xticks(budgets_jericho)
    ax.set_xlim(25, 205)
    ax.yaxis.set_major_formatter(ticker.StrMethodFormatter("{x:.1f}"))
    ax.set_xlabel(XLABEL, fontsize=18, fontweight="bold", labelpad=6)  # 减小 labelpad
axes[1, 0].set_ylabel("Score", fontsize=18, fontweight="bold", labelpad=8)

# --- (a)/(b) 标注 ---
top_row_bottom = min(ax.get_position().y0 for ax in axes[0, :])
bottom_row_top = max(ax.get_position().y1 for ax in axes[1, :])
y_mid = 0.5 * (top_row_bottom + bottom_row_top)
fig.text(0.5, y_mid, "(a) Machine Learning Tasks",
         ha="center", va="center", fontsize=16)
leg_pos = ax_leg.get_position()
fig.text(0.5, leg_pos.y1 + 0.01, "(b) Interactive Games",
         ha="center", va="bottom", fontsize=16)

# --- 全局图例 ---
ax_leg.legend(
    legend_handles, legend_labels,
    loc="center",
    ncol=4,
    frameon=False,
    handlelength=3.0,
    handletextpad=0.6,
    columnspacing=2.5,
    prop={"size": 16},
)

fig.subplots_adjust(left=0.055, right=0.995, top=0.93, bottom=0.06)

# --- 保存 ---
output_png = "/mnt/shared-storage-user/llmbr-share/mayichuan/2025_Q4/Timely_Reasoner/Paper_Writing/combined_scaling_curve.png"
output_pdf = "/mnt/shared-storage-user/llmbr-share/mayichuan/2025_Q4/Timely_Reasoner/Paper_Writing/combined_scaling_curve.pdf"
plt.savefig(output_png, dpi=600)
plt.savefig(output_pdf, format="pdf", dpi=600)
print("Combined ML + Jericho scaling plot saved to:")
print(output_png)
print(output_pdf)
plt.show()
```

**主要修改：**

1. **增加了 `hspace` 从 0.38 到 0.48**：这增加了两行子图之间的垂直间距，给 x 轴标签留出更多空间
2. **减小了下排的 `labelpad` 从 8 到 6**：让 x 轴标签稍微靠近坐标轴一点，避免过度延伸

这样 x 轴标签就不会压到图上了。如果还觉得拥挤，可以继续微调 `hspace` 参数（比如调到 0.50 或更大）。
Timely-RL brings improvements over Qwen3-8B. 改成TimelyLM-8B全面超越了Qwen3-8B

```python

import matplotlib as mpl
import matplotlib.ticker as ticker
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.gridspec as gridspec

# --- 1. 样式设置：与 tokenwise_curve / ml_scaling / jericho_scaling 保持一致 ---
mpl.rcParams.update({
    "font.family": "serif",
    "font.serif": ["Times New Roman", "Times", "TeX Gyre Termes", "Nimbus Roman", "DejaVu Serif"],
    "mathtext.fontset": "stix",
    "font.size": 16,
    "axes.labelsize": 16,
    "axes.titlesize": 18,
    "xtick.labelsize": 14,
    "ytick.labelsize": 14,
    "legend.fontsize": 16,
    "pdf.fonttype": 42,
    "ps.fonttype": 42,
    "axes.spines.top": False,
    "axes.spines.right": False,
    "axes.linewidth": 1.0,
    "xtick.major.width": 1.0,
    "ytick.major.width": 1.0,
    "xtick.minor.width": 0.8,
    "ytick.minor.width": 0.8,
    "xtick.major.size": 4.5,
    "ytick.major.size": 4.5,
    "xtick.minor.size": 2.5,
    "ytick.minor.size": 2.5,
})

# --- 2. 数据整理 ---
# 2.1 ML Agent 四个任务（横轴 budget = 1~5）
budgets_ml = [1.
